title: Playtime-Reborn
description: displays time since the client was opened.
body:
一个简单的模组，用于在主菜单和暂停菜单显示客户端启动的时间。\
**A simple mod is used to display the startup time of the client in the main menu and pause menu.**
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83d1db072f2a22bce917253758703e4e71dcccda.png)
